title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-
sourceNotes: S1 anime (25 eps, 2016). The Re:Zero manga is split across multiple AniList IDs, one per light-novel 'Chapter'/arc. This mapping uses Chapter 3: Truth of Zero (id 87259, 55 ch) which covers S1 eps 7-25 (Roswaal Mansion → Witch's Cult / White Whale / Petelgeuse). Earlier eps adapt Chapter 1 (id 85736, 11 ch) and Chapter 2 (id 85814, 31 ch); S2+ adapt Chapter 4 (Sanctuary) and beyond, each a separate AniList manga.

mappings.arc: Chapter 3: Truth of Zero (Roswaal Mansion → Witch's Cult)
